title: API mode jump scroll v36
notes: API mode is restored with a hard 1-worker limit and sequential direct wishlist API reads. Boosts are removed. Normal mode is capped at 10 workers, Sale at 3, Amazon at 1. Old Max mode is replaced by Jump scroll.

title: Wishlist fast start v35
notes: Wishlist scans now start scrolling immediately after the page opens. The pre-scroll wishlist API wait is skipped by default, so ADD TO CART/BAG DOM hits are handled without the startup delay.

title: Wishlist DOM trust v34
notes: Wishlist DOM hits now bypass the API alias filter, so visible ADD TO CART/BAG cards on the wishlist page are reported by product href even when the API variant key differs. Wishlist-only configs are forced to one worker.

title: Wishlist card link v33
notes: Wishlist DOM detection now treats visible ADD TO CART/BAG buttons inside product cards as availability, extracts the product link from a.fr-ec-product-tile, and never clicks the add-to-cart button.

title: Wishlist stock reload language v32
notes: Wishlist reloads when UNIQLO shows Failed to get items, stock detection is stricter (ADD TO CART/BAG vs NOTIFY ME), and wishlist URLs are accepted only when the language segment is en.

title: Wishlist empty recovery v31
notes: Wishlist now detects an empty viewport after a network stall, stops treating empty scrollY movement as useful progress, and performs a deeper up-scroll recovery before continuing the fast scan.

title: Wishlist fast scroll v30
notes: Wishlist scrolling is much faster: default speed is raised to 2200 px/s, chunks are longer to reduce Python/JS overhead, and old configs are migrated. Up-scroll recovery still runs only after a real stall.

title: What's new v29
notes: The in-app What's New screen now describes the current wishlist lazy-load behavior: recovery scrolls up only after a real stall, while normal forward scrolling is treated as progress.

title: Wishlist forward progress v28
notes: Wishlist up-scroll recovery now runs only when loading is truly stuck: no new cards/height and no forward scroll progress. Normal downward scrolling no longer triggers recovery just because visible card count is stable.

title: Wishlist stuck recovery v27
notes: Wishlist scrolling no longer reloads at partial counts like 233/999. Up-scroll recovery now runs only after loading stalls, uses a stronger upward nudge, extends timeout for large wishlists, forces wishlist to one worker, and save-wishlist reports login state clearly.

title: Wishlist progress stable v25
notes: Wishlist progress is now based on loaded cards versus the page total, worker rows update without flicker, short pause no longer resets progress, and 100% is shown only after the target count is reached.

title: Wishlist live card count v24
notes: Wishlist live-scroll now reports loaded DOM cards separately from API total, adds a per-worker scroll progress bar, and no longer shows a 999 wishlist target as already scanned before the page reaches the bottom.

title: Wishlist live scroll v23
notes: Wishlist now uses browser live-scroll by default instead of API-only waves. It reacts to in-stock wishlist cards as soon as they load during scrolling, keeps scrolling after a hit, and no longer emits API-only products as a batch at the end.

title: Wishlist live chunks v22
notes: Fixes the real reason wishlist browser results were emitted in a batch at the bottom: the scroll JavaScript had a hidden 15-second minimum chunk. Browser scroll now yields back to Python in short live chunks, checks the first screen immediately, and keeps the strict product/color/size filtering from V21.

title: Wishlist DOM strict v21
notes: Fixes wishlist browser-mode false positives: visible DOM Add to cart cards are now filtered by the exact wishlist product/color/size from the API, so a saved color no longer opens a neighboring /00 variant. Finds can be emitted during scrolling from the early API read instead of waiting for the bottom. Keeps the V20 version-manager fallback.

title: Version manager fallback v20
notes: Fixes the version manager: old versions are visible again from the local FastWorkSingle runtime cache, GitHub API has raw-manifest fallback, and settings now show a useful load status instead of silently leaving only the current version.

title: Wishlist live URL v19
notes: Wishlist fix: exact saved product URL is preserved, so /01 links no longer turn into /00 variants. Browser wishlist scan now shows found items while scrolling instead of waiting for the very bottom. Added a first-launch update card with a short animated presentation and human-readable changes.

title: Wishlist API strict v18
notes: Fixes wishlist API strict variant filtering so same-name different-price variants are not reported; API waves now continue past the first page when total is missing.

title: Test v17
notes: Test build: shows the program version under the tab menu.

title: Startup update check v16
notes: Previous build with centered startup update dialog and one-click update download.

title: Versions history v15
notes: Previous build with version history, private manifest token support, and one-way rollback protection.

title: Version manager v14
notes: Old build. New manager remains open when this version is launched.
